The '''Javelin''' was an aquatic craft armed with surface-to-air missiles for targeting [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] and [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. They were used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to accompany [[Water/Legends|water]] fleets or water transport vessels to guard against strafing and to provide anti-air defense to Rebel shipyards.

The '''Heavy Javelin''' was an upgraded model of the standard Javelin. Instead of one surface-to-air missile launcher, the Heavy Javelin had two.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
